topics.summary: Advance voting for the June 3 nationwide local elections opened on May 29, with polling blackouts now in effect. Final pre-blackout surveys show DPK candidates leading in Seoul (정원오 46% vs 오세훈 35%) and Busan (전재수 45% vs 박형준 36%), though PPP claims incomplete opposition consolidation may tighten races.

evidence_headlines.title: 정원오 46% 오세훈 35%…전재수 45% 박형준 36% [여론조사]
[여론M] 보수 결집이라는데 국민의힘 지지율은 제자리‥왜?
[MBC여론조사] 서울시장, 정원오 41% vs 오세훈 37%‥오차범위 내 접전

topics.summary: A Starbucks Korea 'Tank Day' marketing event on May 18 sparked a boycott campaign led by the DPK, which framed it as invoking the 5·18 massacre imagery; PPP leader Jang Dong-hyeok counter-mobilized supporters with Starbucks photo-ops, calling the boycott a pre-election smear and 'people's tribunal.'

evidence_headlines.title: 국힘, '죽창가'까지 소환해 스벅 감싸기 총력전‥與 '국힘 일베당 선언'
장동혁 '예언하자면 李·민주당, 6월 3일 지나면 스벅 들고 다닐 것'
한국 스타벅스 탱크데이 이벤트 논란/후속 논란

topics.summary: The DPK-sponsored 'fabricated prosecution special counsel' bill, which would empower a special prosecutor to cancel charges against President Lee Jae-myung, has been paused until after the June 3 elections amid criticism from legal scholars and fierce PPP opposition; PPP formed a dedicated task force to block it post-election.

evidence_headlines.title: 이 대통령 재판 8개 모두 '무효화'되는 길 열리나···'조작기소 특검법안' 논란 확산
국힘 '공소취소 특검, 선거 이후 반드시 재추진 될 것'
정진석 '이재명 공소취소 특검법이 내란'

topics.summary: On May 28, a Seoul court acquitted former President Yoon Suk-yeol of perjury charges related to false testimony in the Han Duck-soo insurrection trial — marking the first not-guilty verdict among his several ongoing criminal cases; the insurrection special counsel had sought a two-year prison sentence.

evidence_headlines.title: 尹, '계엄 국무회의 위증 혐의' 1심 무죄... 기소 사건 중 첫 무죄 판결
윤석열 '한덕수 재판 위증' 혐의 이번주 1심 선고
윤석열 내란 재판/전개

topics.summary: Former PPP leader Han Dong-hoon, running as an independent in the Busan Buk-gu Gap by-election, cast his advance ballot on May 29 and leads polls at around 43% against DPK candidate Ha Jeong-woo at 33%, framing his campaign as 'rebuilding conservatism and checking Lee Jae-myung's administration.'

evidence_headlines.title: 한동훈, 사전투표 참여…'북구 발전·보수 재건·이재명 정권 견제 선거'
한동훈, 부산 북갑 후보 등록…하정우·박민식 이어 기호 6번(종합)
부산 북구갑에선 무소속 한동훈 후보가 43%…접전

topics.summary: President Lee's job-approval rating stands at approximately 59–66% depending on pollster, having hit a post-inauguration high of 65.5% the week of May 13–17; a slight dip followed in the most recent survey, attributed to the Samsung Electronics bonus dispute and other domestic friction as the local elections approach.

evidence_headlines.title: 이 대통령 지지율 65.5% 취임 후 최고‥민주당 50.5%·국힘 31.4%
[MBC여론조사] 이 대통령 지지율, 서울·부산·대구 60% 넘겨
6·3 지방선거가 열흘 앞…스타벅스 논란에 민주당 지지도 올라

topics.summary: Cho Kuk Party leader Cho Kuk leads narrowly in the Pyeongtaek-eul by-election at 29% against DPK's Kim Yong-nam at 26% and PPP's Yoo Eui-dong at 20%, with sharp personal attacks exchanged between the Cho Kuk and DPK camps exposing intra-progressive tensions ahead of the vote.

evidence_headlines.title: [MBC여론조사] 경기 평택을, 김용남 26% vs 유의동 20% vs 조국 29%
한동훈 39%, 하정우 33%…조국 24%, 김용남 22% 유의동 20%
[MBC여론조사] 경기 평택을‥김용남 31%, 유의동 17%, 조국 27%

topics.topic_en: North Korea West Sea Missile Provocation
topics.summary: North Korea fired an unidentified projectile into the West Sea on May 26 — its eighth provocation of 2026 and first in 37 days — days before South Korea's local elections, with South Korean and U.S. intelligence jointly analyzing the launch amid heightened inter-Korean tension.

evidence_headlines.title: 북한 미상 발사체 발사: 37일 만에 재개된 서해상 발사, 올해 8번째 도발
2026년 북한 미사일 도발

method_notes: Captured via Anthropic API (Sonnet 4.6) with web_search for live Korean political coverage. Topic labels (topic_en) are stable handles for cross-snapshot rank comparison.
